pkgmetadata.longdescription: Hypixel Python wrapper for the Hypixel-API... image httpsi.imgur.comeFWzNiy.png target httpsgitlab.comSnuggiehypixel.py alt hypixel.py Logo------------------.. image httpsimg.shields.iobadgehypixel--api-python-brightgreen.svgcolorA2d2306colorB705810 target httpsapi.hypixel.net alt Hypixel API - Python.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypivhypixel.svgcolorA2d2306colorB705810 target httpspypi.orgprojecthypixel alt PiPy Version.. image httpsimg.shields.iobadgebuild-not yet implemented (-brightgreen.svgcolorA2d2306colorB705810 target httpsgitlab.comSnuggIehypixel.pypipelines alt Travis Ci Build.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypipyversionshypixel.svgcolorA2d2306colorB705810 target httpspypi.orgprojecthypixel alt Supported Python Versions.. image httpsimg.shields.iobadgemade20by-snuggle2020hypixel20moderator-brightgreen.svgcolorA2d2306colorB705810 target httpshypixel.netplayerSnuggle alt Made by SnuggleThis is a simple, unofficial Python library which allows you to get values from the Hypixel-API using a JSON request. Designed for use with the latest version of Python with two previous versions also tested.Please see httpsgitlab.comSnuggiehypixel.py httpsgitlab.comSnuggiehypixel.py_ for installationusage information.
